BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================
CUSTOMERS
==========================================

Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
|... [TRUNCATED]

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)
- [missing other FK definitions]

==========================================

|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | R... [TRUNCATED]

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| payment_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| PaymentID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing docu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Client
triplets.object: A person or company that purchases goods or services

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: The person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: The actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: A request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: Similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: A preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: The transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: The process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: The process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Customers.Customer Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer_id column in the CUSTOMERS table that uniquely identifies each customer (the primary key and common reference for related records).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | | CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id | | CustomerID | INTEGER | FK | [FK reference unclear] | | Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer'S First Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer's given name (the first name) stored as a separate attribute from the surname.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | firstName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's first name | | | first_name | VARCHAR(50) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] | | | lastName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's last name | | | last_name | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Discount Percentage
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric field representing the discount as a percentage (e.g., stored as DECIMAL(5,2)).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | discount_percent | DECIMAL(5,2) | ? | Discount percentage | | discount_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Calculated discount

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction is a monetary exchange between parties, i.e., the transfer of money as part of a value-for-value exchange.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value.

entities_post_resolution.name: Revenue From Selling Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: Revenue earned by the company from selling products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue. | Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales]

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Details
entities_post_resolution.definition: The line items within a sales order, i.e., the products, quantities, and prices that comprise the order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Created Datetime
entities_post_resolution.definition: The timestamp indicating when an order was created (date and time).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | OrderDate | DATETIME | ? | [different precision?] | | | order_date | DATE | ? | Date order was created |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique numeric identifier serving as the primary key for an Order record, typically stored as the order_id column in the orders table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify) | | OrderID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] | | customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | | order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: The monetary transfer of funds to settle an order, represented by individual payment transactions in a payments system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order. | Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database column that stores the product's name as a string (up to 255 characters).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | product_name | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A foreign key column that stores the product identifier referencing the PRODUCTS table to identify which product an order or inventory record relates to.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | product_id | INTEGER | FK | References PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY?) | ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?) | | product_id | INTEGER | PK | Unique product identifier | | ProductID | INTEGER | FK | [inconsistent naming]

entities_post_resolution.name: Tax Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: A decimal field representing the monetary amount of tax charged or owed on a transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | tax_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Tax amount | | | TaxAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [duplicate?] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Process Of Preparing
entities_post_resolution.definition: The end-to-end business process of preparing, packing, and delivering customer orders to their destination (order fulfillment).
synonyms: The process of delivering goods to a customer
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery. | Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer.

entities_post_resolution.name: Account Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database field storing the current status of an account (e.g., active, closed), typically defined as VARCHAR(20).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | account_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing values documentation] | | | status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [duplicate?] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Type
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer_type attribute: a VARCHAR(30) field that stores the type or category of a customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | customer_type | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Last Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database column that stores the customer's family name (last name) in a customer data record.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | last_name | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] | | | lastName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's last name |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A field in an order record that stores the current status of the order (e.g., pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | order_status | VARCHAR(25) | ? | See valid values in... [missing reference] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Method
entities_post_resolution.definition: A data attribute representing the method of payment used by a payer, stored as a string (VARCHAR(30)), such as credit card, bank transfer, or other payment types.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | payment_method | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: The payment_status concept represents the current status of a payment, stored as a string (e.g., 'pending', 'completed') in the payment_status field.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | payment_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing documentation] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Updated At
entities_post_resolution.definition: A timestamp field that records the last time a record was updated in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | | | updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation]

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: An email address field used to store a user's electronic mail contact.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | email | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Email address | | | emailAddress | VARCHAR(255) | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | phone | VARCHAR(20) | ? | Contact phone number | | | phoneNumber | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [possible duplicate] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Notes
entities_post_resolution.definition: A textual field used to store free-form notes or comments about the record in the data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | notes | TEXT | ? | [missing documentation] | | | Notes | TEXT | ? | [duplicate?] |

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about customers, including identifiers, contact details, creation timestamps, and basic account and demographic attributes.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: Stores order transactions including identifiers, customer linkage, dates, statuses, financial amounts (order, total, shipping, and tax), payment details, timestamps, and notes.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: Stores the items contained in each order, including product identifiers, quantities, pricing, discounts, and the computed line total for each order line.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information including identifiers, naming, categorization, pricing, stock levels, activation status, and descriptive metadata for each product.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments processed for customer orders, including amounts, methods, statuses, and related transaction details.
